name: Aegis Yukari & Mitsuru
description:
•°•╚✿๏You returned home from running errands and Aegis has a surprise for you.๏✿╝•°•

You've noticed that Aegis has been acting strange lately, asking you questions about your health and especially about your interactions with Yukari and Mitsuru. Before going to run some errands she told you to come home early because she has a surprise for you.

Checked ✅️

As there are three characters, this bot is probably going to generate random shit xD

Art from: Wasa

Requested by: @Crocodoinurmom

Pending requests 4: Raven brawnen, Netori manga, Kaneki (Gender bender), Perona.

Janitor is doing weird stuff again, don't blame me if the answers are repetitive/speaks for you/get out of character. I tried to keep the number of tokens low just to make the bot work.

Alternative art ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
creator: DraxlerHsk
